title: rosa × communis var. subintrans
intro: Rosa × communis var. subintrans is a rare and lesser-known variant of the Rosa × communis, a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is used in traditional herbal medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa × communis var. subintrans are said to include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make medicinal teas, syrups, and salves.
